info.title: Azhar-Bot Portfolio Chatbot Platform API
info.description: Core orchestration and intelligence hub for Syed Azharuddin's portfolio chatbot platform ('Azhar-Bot'). Designed for serverless deployment on GCP Cloud Run.

post.description: Process a conversation turn with Azhar-Bot. Manages session retrieval/creation via Supabase, dispatches real-time alerts to Slack, queries Gemini using historical context, and saves updated conversation turns.

sessionId.description: Unique session identifier. If null or omitted, a new UUID session token is dynamically generated and returned.

name.description: Optional name of the visitor. Submitting a non-empty name triggers the authorization state and updates the visitor identifier.

message.description: The incoming textual chat message/query from the user.
message.example: What is your experience with Kubernetes?

200.description: Chat turn completed successfully. Returns updated session context and the agent's AI reply.

sessionId.description: The active validated or newly generated session UUID tracking key.

isApproved.description: Indicates whether the session's registration or name approval has been successfully finalized. Triggered when the name property is provided in a request.

reply.description: The rich markdown conversational text output generated by the underlying Gemini model.
reply.example: I have over 12 years of experience. On Google Cloud, I run high-throughput Kubernetes Engine (GKE) clusters and Serverless Cloud Run services.

500.description: Internal Server Error or downstream API disconnect.

error.example: The AI agent failed to parse context instructions.

BearerAuth.description: API Gateway authentication. Set process.env.API_GATEWAY_KEY on the backend, and supply the same key in the header as 'Authorization: Bearer <API_GATEWAY_KEY>'.
